module.name: target
module.description: Concentric-circle (onion / target) diagram: rings from the core outward, each labeled — for scopes, priorities, ecosystem layers. One ring per section, innermost first.
module.aiSpec:
A CONCENTRIC-CIRCLE diagram (onion / target): a core with rings around it, each ring labeled — for scope levels (core → extended), priorities, ecosystems, zones of control. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one ring per section, INNERMOST FIRST; each section is the ring's label (Markdown). Params: `color` (base hue, default var(--accent-color); rings fade outward). Keep to 3–5 rings. Not for overlapping sets — use `venn` for those; not for nested hierarchies with children — use `tree`.
<!-- @target --> Core <!-- @ --> Team <!-- @ --> Company <!-- @ --> Market <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Base color
param.desc: Base hue of the rings; each ring is a lighter mix of it, fading outward.
